LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF JOHN SHIELS' MOTION TO APPOINT NEUTRAL APPRAISER WAS TRANSFERRED TO BE HEARD ON THE SAME DATE AT 9:30 A.M. IN DEPT. 501, REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING COURT, WHICH PURSUANT TO THE COURT'S LOCAL RULES HEARS ALL LAW AND MOTION MATTERS FOR CASES ARISING OUT OF OWNERSHIP, POSSESSION, AND ACQUISITION OF REAL PROPERTY. (SEE SF LOCAL RULE 8.10A1.) JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, NOT REPORTED.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-24-2019 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Appoint Neutral Appraiser
Off Calendar Nov-07-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF JOHN SHIELS' Motion To Appoint Neutral Appraiser.

Transferred to be heard on the same date at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 501, Real Property/Housing Court, which pursuant to the Court's Local Rules hears all law and motion matters for cases arising out of ownership, possession, and acquisition of real property. (See SF Local Rule 8.10A1.)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)

Motion To Appoint An Appraiser
Off Calendar Nov-07-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances: The Court Adopts the Tentative ruling as follows:

Motion To Appoint An Appraiser is OFF CALENDAR per request of the moving party.
Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Recorded. (501)
